arts.ttl: Are there FA Cup third round replays? Competition rules explained for Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: Premier League chief executive Richard Masters concurred, highlighting the concerted effort to boost the FA Cup: "Throughout our discussions, both parties have been committed to enhancing the scheduling of the Emirates FA Cup, a hugely important domestic competition with a storied history. Replays from the first round proper onward have been scrapped following a new scheduling agreement between the FA and the Premier League .

arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Chelsea host League Two side Morecambe at Stamford Bridge in the third round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea vs Morecambe isn't on TV as FA Cup picks explained
arts.sum: Chelsea's clash with Morecambe is one of 32 games taking place this weekend and only 11 of them have been selected for TV coverage across the BBC and ITV. Instead, Chelsea supporters will be able to watch extended highlights of their game against Morecambe on the BBC's round-up show at 10.30pm, or on iPlayer.
